title: Huntington (HBAN) Stock Poised for Growth: Should You Hold?
text: Huntington's (HBAN) stock is worth keeping on a sound balance sheet position and inorganic growth moves. Yet, a concentrated loan portfolio and margin pressure are bothersome.

title: Why Wedbush's Peter Winter Says Fed Will Gradually Increase Rates, And What It Means For Bank Stocks
text: The sentiment is building for a half basis point hike by the Federal Reserve in March. However, Peter Winter, who covers regional banks at Wedbush Securities, is not so convinced.

title: Huntington Awarded on the Forbes America's Best Employers 2022 List
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio, Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington has been awarded on the Forbes list of America's Best Employers 2022. This prestigious award is presented by Forbes and Statista Inc., the world-leading statistics portal and industry ranking provider.
